provenance.source: Hand-authored for toolcall-repair-bench; models the toolName_brace_json failure shape common to small local models.

request_tools.name: list_directory
request_tools.description: List the contents of a directory.

note: The tool name is glued to a Python-ish dict with single quotes and a trailing comma; normalizing quotes and dropping the trailing comma yields the unambiguous list_directory call.
